meta.title: Watch SpaceX launch Tranche 1 Transport Layer C for Space Force!
meta.description:
SpaceX is launching Tranche 1 Transport Layer C, the third of six missions under the U.S. Space Development Agency's Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture, NET 4:11 p.m. PDT [23:11 UTC] on October 14th, 2025 from SLC-4E at Vandenberg Space Force Base, California. Today's Booster is B1093-7 and it will be targeting a downrange landing on Of Course I Still Love You droneship.

Thanks to the United States Space Force for supporting this livestream and for helping us get access inside Vandenberg to make our video about the range! To learn more about the Space Force's roles during these missions, visit https://www.spaceforce.com/ #ad 

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! Check it out anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) by searching Everyday Astronaut
